tier1b_recall_probe.role: independent recall probe; not summed into the flow

identification.note: OpenAlex (Tier-1) is the only source contributing to the flow. Crossref (Tier-1b) is an independent recall probe. Tier-2/3 registered counts are count-only coverage checks reported alongside but NOT summed into the dedup math.

screening.note: The 236 priority-cutoff records were topically eligible but NOT assessed (a workload/corpus-bounding decision), and are reported as 'not assessed' rather than as topical exclusions. Topical (out-of-scope) exclusions total 7. The two operations are kept logically separate; 7 + 236 = 243 records leave the pipeline before eligibility assessment, and 443 = 7 + 236 + 200.

supplementary_multisource_search.protocol: identical title-scoped query as OpenAlex Tier-1, per-platform Title field, 2023-2026

SpringerLink.query: title=(agent OR agentic) AND (benchmark OR evaluation)

IEEE Xplore.query: ("Document Title":agent OR agentic) AND ("Document Title":benchmark OR evaluation)

supplementary_multisource_search.reconciliation: 580-56=524 screened; 524=339+185; 185=150+35 (full-text confirmed; prior 6 held-out + 3 title-stage includes resolved to Exclude)
supplementary_multisource_search.note: Full-text confirmation completed: the 6 held-out Uncertain records and 3 title-stage Includes were resolved against full text, all to Exclude; 35 confirmed includes. Co-author decisions in coauthor_screening_returned.csv.

note_v2: v2 (2026-06-09): supplementary title-scoped multi-source search (Springer/IEEE/ACM) added 38 dual-screened studies; primary OpenAlex flow (259) unchanged; living-review corpus total = 297.

semantic_scholar.method: bulk search (LLM|large language model)(agent|agentic)(benchmark|evaluation), 2023-2026, plus title-match probe
semantic_scholar.result: reachable; returns the agent-evaluation literature; canonical-benchmark probe confirmed (SWE-bench, arXiv 2310.06770, indexed)
semantic_scholar.note: Title-restricted harvest is not supported by the API (relevance search over title+abstract); treated as a coverage probe like Scopus. Corroborates OpenAlex; adds no canonical benchmark. Reclassified from the original UNRESOLVED:no_credentials, which was overcautious.

note_v3: v3: full-text confirmation reduced supplementary includes 38->35 (corpus 297->294); primary 259 unchanged.
